newsSince: No material AI-chain news since June 9. Recent items reiterate FY2025 record results (adj. EBITDA EUR 243M) and a 2026 growth outlook driven by higher US EAF steel-dust volumes, offset by a higher zinc treatment charge (~$100-130/t vs $80/t in 2025). The -5.5% move likely reflects the June 17 ex-dividend and zinc/TC noise, not new fundamentals.

sources.label: Befesa AGM agenda and capital return - ad-hoc-news

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold rank 7. No new fundamental information since June 9; the -5.5% drift is ex-dividend/flow noise post the routine June 16 AGM. The latent metals-circularity-for-AI-build-out node is intact and marginally cheaper - no thesis-changing evidence to move the rank.
verdicts.bull: Steel-dust/aluminum-residue recycling leverages metal circularity as AI build-out lifts EAF steel and metal demand; record 2025 EBITDA.
verdicts.neutral: Solid circular-economy compounder but the AI link is indirect and speculative.
verdicts.bear: Higher 2026 zinc treatment charge (~$100-130/t vs $80) pressures margins; AI tie is tenuous.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Higher US EAF steel-dust volumes from new steelmaker contracts.
